allow: Bash(python -c "import sqlite3, os; db='D:/agent/data/a3_learning.db'; conn=sqlite3.connect\(db\); conn.row_factory=sqlite3.Row; count=conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as c FROM chat_messages'\).fetchone\(\)['c']; print\(f'chat_messages count: {count}'\); rows=conn.execute\('SELECT id,role,substr\(text,1,80\) as preview FROM chat_messages ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5'\).fetchall\(\); [print\(f'  [{r[chr\(34\)+chr\(105\)+chr\(100\)+chr\(34\)}] {r[chr\(34\)+chr\(114\)+chr\(111\)+chr\(108\)+chr\(101\)+chr\(34\)]}: {r[chr\(34\)+chr\(112\)+chr\(114\)+chr\(101\)+chr\(118\)+chr\(105\)+chr\(101\)+chr\(119\)+chr\(34\)]}'\) for r in rows]; conn.close\(\)")
